TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kainisungan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 89 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 79 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 66%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Truku 6%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 4%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kainisungan hya' ga Talunas. tay 'llaw na Kainisungan hya' ga Pasikau. tay 'zil na Kainisungan hya' ga Vakangan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kainisungan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kainisungan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kainis~…ēuŇčan …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na kainis~…ēuŇčan ńßja Ē …£a talunas~…ē. taj Ēllaw na kainis~…ēuŇčan ńßja Ē …£a pas~…ēikau. taj Ēzil na kainis~…ēuŇčan ńßja Ē …£a *akaŇčan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč kainis~…ēuŇčan …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč kainis~…ēuŇčan …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Kainisungan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 89 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 79 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 66%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Truku 6%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 4%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kainisungan hya' ga Talunas. tay 'llaw na Kainisungan hya' ga Pasikau. tay 'zil na Kainisungan hya' ga Vakangan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kainisungan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kainisungan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kainis~…ēuŇčan …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na kainis~…ēuŇčan ńßja Ē …£a talunas~…ē. taj Ēllaw na kainis~…ēuŇčan ńßja Ē …£a pas~…ēikau. taj Ēzil na kainis~…ēuŇčan ńßja Ē …£a *akaŇčan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč kainis~…ēuŇčan …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč kainis~…ēuŇčan …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
